contexts.context: ...his Miser, a free translation from Moliere's <mark>L'Avare</mark>, is the only one of his pieces which...
...holds the same rank of the English stage which <mark>L'Avare</mark> does on the French.—It is worthy of remark...
...(1669, Tartuffe, or The Impostor), <mark>L'Avare</mark> (1669, The Miser), and George Dandin...
